channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Google DeepMind] Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
item.description: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning

item.title: [Anthropic] Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise
item.description: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise

item.title: [Hacker News] Apple is about to make Hide My Email useless
item.description: Apple is about to make Hide My Email useless

item.title: [Hacker News] GPT‑NL: a sovereign language model for the Netherlands
item.description: GPT‑NL: a sovereign language model for the Netherlands

item.title: [Hacker News] Claude: Elevated errors across many models
item.description: Claude: Elevated errors across many models

item.title: [Hacker News] Has AI already killed self-help nonfiction books?
item.description: Has AI already killed self-help nonfiction books?

item.title: [Simon Willison] datasette-tailscale 0.1a0
item.description: datasette-tailscale 0.1a0

item.title: [Interconnects] Frontier post-training recipe review with Finbarr Timbers
item.description: Frontier post-training recipe review with Finbarr Timbers

item.title: [Hacker News] Qwen-Robot Suite: A Foundation Model Suite for Physical World Intelligence
item.description: Qwen-Robot Suite: A Foundation Model Suite for Physical World Intelligence

item.title: [GitHub Trending] OpenBMB/VoxCPM — VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
item.description: VoxCPM2 introduces tokenizer-free text-to-speech supporting multilingual generation, creative voice design, and realistic voice cloning.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] alibaba/zvec — A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database
item.description: Alibaba released zvec, an in-process vector database project.

item.title: [Hacker News] SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60B
item.description: SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60B

item.title: [Anthropic] Core views on AI safety: When, why, what, and how
item.description: Core views on AI safety: When, why, what, and how

item.title: [Hacker News] Feds freaked over Fable 5 after simple 'fix this code' prompt, not jailbreak
item.description: Feds freaked over Fable 5 after simple 'fix this code' prompt, not jailbreak

item.title: [HuggingFace] zai-org/GLM-5.2 · 159♥ · 0 dl
item.description: GLM-5.2 is a text generation model repository on HuggingFace by zai-org with 159 likes.

item.title: [Hacker News] I admire Fabrice Bellard. He is almost certainly a better overall programmer
item.description: I admire Fabrice Bellard. He is almost certainly a better overall programmer

item.title: [Hacker News] OpenAI Losses Increased Nearly 8X in 2025, with Spending Hitting $34B
item.description: OpenAI Losses Increased Nearly 8X in 2025, with Spending Hitting $34B

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] QPILOTS: Efficient Test-Time Q-Steering for Flow Policies
item.description: QPILOTS steers diffusion policies at test-time via projected action gradients, achieving 90% average success on offline-to-online RL benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GRAPE: Guided Parameter-Space Evolution for Compact Adversarial Robustness
item.description: GRAPE progressively expands parameter space during adversarial training, improving CIFAR-10 PGD-20 robust accuracy from 51.70% to 56.94% while reducing model parameters by 21.4%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] {\alpha}-Fair Insurance Pricing: A Fairness Continuum
item.description: Researchers propose α-FISP framework for insurance pricing that balances actuarial fairness with solidarity fairness while maintaining solvency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GRASP: Gradient-Aligned Sequential Parameter Transfer for Memory-Efficient Multi-Source Learning
item.description: GRASP reduces multi-source transfer learning memory from O(K) to O(1) by sequentially processing models with selective gradient-aligned parameter transfer.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Policy Regret for Embedding Model Routing: Contextual Bandits with Low-Rank Experts
item.description: Hypentropy Policy Gradient algorithm enables efficient routing of queries to multiple embedding models while adapting to low-rank structure.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Separable Neural Architectures as Physical World Models: from Mathematical Theory to Applications
item.description: Separable Neural Architecture decouples coordinate functions and interactions using tensor decomposition to solve high-dimensional PDEs with linear rather than exponential scaling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Remember, Don't Re-read: Stateful ReAct Agents for Token-Efficient Autonomous Experimentation
item.description: Stateful ReAct agents reduce token costs in autonomous experimentation by 52-90% versus stateless designs by maintaining persistent experimental context.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Comparative Study of Graph Neural Network Layer Selection for Interaction Modelling in Driving Trajectory Prediction
item.description: Study compares 19 GNN layer types for autonomous driving trajectory prediction, identifying ARMA, Chebyshev, and topology-aware layers as most effective.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Leveraging Physiological Signals to Predict Exam Outcomes with Machine Learning
item.description: Machine learning models predict exam outcomes from physiological signals including heart rate and skin temperature, with random forests offering better efficiency than deep learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Benchmarking Instance-Dependent Label Noise with Controlled Corruptions
item.description: CILN, a benchmark framework, generates instance-dependent label noise through controlled corruptions, making ambiguity source and severity explicit for evaluating noisy-label learning methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Zero-order Parameter-free Optimization for LMO-based Methods: Novel Approach for Efficient Fine-tuning
item.description: AdaNAGED is a zero-order parameter-free optimization method for memory-efficient LLM fine-tuning without manual hyperparameter adjustment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FastMix: Fast Data Mixture Optimization via Gradient Descent
item.description: FastMix automatically discovers optimal data mixtures for pre-training using gradient-based bilevel optimization, improving efficiency over prior approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rational Sparse Autoencoder
item.description: Rational Sparse Autoencoder replaces fixed encoder activations with trainable rational functions to improve reconstruction-sparsity performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Unlocking Latent Dimensions: Exploring Representations of Large-Scale X-ray Scattering Data using Variational Autoencoders
item.description: Domain-specific VAE learns interpretable latent representations from 1.5M X-ray scattering images, enabling structural exploration and outperforming general vision models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] How Should World Models Be Evaluated? A Decision-Making-Centric Position
item.description: Paper proposes decision-making-centric evaluation framework for world models, addressing widespread claim/evidence mismatch in current literature.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Transformers Learn the Mestre-Nagao Heuristic
item.description: Transformer trained on elliptic curve data independently learned the Mestre-Nagao heuristic from analytic number theory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Temporal Difference Learning for Diffusion Models
item.description: Temporal difference learning for diffusion models improves generation quality by enforcing consistency across denoising steps, especially with fewer sampling iterations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-conforming Latent Twins
item.description: Researchers develop Physics-conforming Latent Twins framework for surrogate models that enforce conservation laws and physical invariants in learned latent dynamics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Size Doesn't Matter: Cosine-Scored Sparse Autoencoders
item.description: Cosine-scored sparse autoencoders better detect human-interpretable features compared to standard inner-product scoring on normalized representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Machine Learning and the Random Walk Puzzle: Forecasting the CAD/USD Exchange Rate with Expanding Window Evaluation and SHAP Interpretability
item.description: Linear regression outperforms random walk in USD/CAD exchange rate forecasting; ensemble models show only marginal improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Phase-Localized Curation Does Not Help: A Negative Result on Per-Phase Metric Selection for Demonstration Filtering
item.description: Per-phase metric selection for demonstration curation underperforms global metrics because aggregating scores across phases dilutes concentrated defect signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TriAdReview: Triangular Adversarial Review Architecture for Multi-Model Technical Document Generation
item.description: Dual-reviewer adversarial architecture improves LLM technical document generation by 10.1%, with strong gains in security and code generation but weaker results on requirements analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] An Integrable Token Mixing Layer from the Generalized Yang Baxter Equation
item.description: YB Mixer applies integrable systems principles to create a stable, orthogonal token mixing layer with flexible inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] High-Dimensional Random Projection for Activation Steering in Language Models
item.description: HiDRA improves activation steering in language models by using high-dimensional random projection to capture nonlinear features beyond linear methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diversity-Driven Offline Multi-Objective Optimization via Nested Pareto Set Learning
item.description: DOMOO addresses offline multi-objective optimization by using risk control and Pareto set learning to find diverse, high-quality solutions without function evaluations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Accuracy: Measuring Bias Acknowledgment in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Responsible AI Evaluation
item.description: GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet 4 show similar bias susceptibility but markedly different rates of acknowledging bias in reasoning traces.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Contextual Bandits for Maximizing Stimulated Word-of-Mouth Rewards
item.description: Contextual bandit framework learns individual spillover probabilities in social networks to optimize word-of-mouth marketing effectiveness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] False Sense of Safety in Selective Signal Classification: Auditing Bound Tightness and Exchangeability for Risk Control
item.description: Study shows naive calibration methods frequently exceed error budgets in sound and image detection, while certified bounds fail when deployment distributions shift.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Semantic Reasoning in Medicine: The Role of Knowledge Graphs Across Five Key Domains
item.description: Knowledge graphs represent biomedical data relationships to enable semantic reasoning for clinical decision support, disease prediction, and personalized medicine despite ongoing challenges.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PolyKV: Heterogeneous Retention and Allocation for KV Cache Compression
item.description: PolyKV optimizes KV cache compression in transformers by using layer-specific policies and heterogeneous budget allocation instead of uniform approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PhoneHarness: Harnessing Phone-Use Agents through Mixed GUI, CLI, and Tool Actions
item.description: PhoneHarness benchmark evaluates mobile agents on mixed GUI, CLI, and tool actions with verifiable task completion, achieving 75% pass rate.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluating the Robustness of Proof Autoformalization in Lean 4
item.description: Study finds LLM-based proof autoformalization models lack robustness to paraphrased and locally perturbed informal mathematical proofs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Context Compression Is Not One Thing: Readable Symbolic Re-expression vs. Coherent Summary at Matched Budget
item.description: Telegraph English, a symbolic entity-relation format, outperforms natural language summaries and baselines for context compression in multi-hop question answering by 13-20 F1 points.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Simplifying the Modeling of Arbitrary Conditionals in Natural Language
item.description: AC-GPT enables Transformers to evaluate and sample from arbitrary conditionals across past, future, and mixed contexts while preserving standard left-to-right training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CoRA: Confidence-Rationale Alignment for Reliable Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
item.description: CoRA uses reinforcement learning to align LLM confidence with reasoning quality, reducing confidence-rationale misalignment by up to 26.51% across medical, math, and QA tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Nemotron 3 Ultra: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
item.description: Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550B Mamba-Transformer model, achieves 6x faster inference with 1M context and open-source checkpoints for agentic tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Are Online Skill and Memory Modules Always Worth Their Tokens? A Budget-Constrained Study of Web Agents
item.description: Vanilla baselines match augmented web agents when token-budgets are equal, suggesting memory and skill modules don't justify their inference token costs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Deep Temporal Modeling and Ensemble Fusion for Multimodal Emotion Recognition from Physiological Signals
item.description: Transformer models and ensemble fusion achieve 98.91% accuracy for emotion recognition from physiological wrist and chest sensor signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ReportQA: QA-Based Radiology Report Evaluation
item.description: ReportQA evaluates radiology reports using LLM-generated QA pairs, showing better alignment with radiologist judgment than existing metrics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Equity with Efficiency: An Empirical Study of Tokenizers for Multilingual Large Language Models
item.description: Study compares tokenizers for multilingual LLMs, finding Parity-aware BPE balances efficiency and fairness across 11 Southeast Asian languages.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Practical Evaluation Method for Long-Form Simultaneous Speech-to-Speech Translation
item.description: New evaluation method for long-form simultaneous speech-to-speech translation reveals current systems experience substantial latency accumulation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CoCoGEC: Counterfactual Generation for Robust Grammatical Error Correction
item.description: CoCoGEC generates counterfactual training data with altered contexts to improve grammatical error correction model stability, with F0.5 gains up to +20.8.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Stop When Further Reasoning Won't Help: Attention-State Adaptive Generation in Reasoning Models
item.description: Paper proposes ASAG, a training-free method using attention distributions to stop reasoning model generation early, improving accuracy 3.2% while reducing tokens by 40%.
